state.title: Swagger UI
state.bodyText:
GetUpSoft Backend Nest
 0.1.0 
OAS 3.0

NestJS migration target for internal GetUpSoft APIs.

health
GET
/healthz
NestJS backend liveness probe
orca
GET
/health
Compatibility endpoint migrated from orca/service/app.py
POST
/interpret
Interpret prompt through the ORCA core bridge
POST
/n8n-payload
Build n8n payload through the migrated NestJS endpoint
workers
POST
/tasks
Submit task migrated from ai_automation_orchestrator/task_server.py
GET
/tasks
List all task statuses
GET
/tasks/{taskId}
Get task status by id
workspace
GET
/api/workspace/status
Get workspace and git status
GET
/api/workspace/files
List files in workspace directory
POST
/api/workspace/files/read
Read a workspace file
POST
/api/workspace/files/write
Write a workspace file
POST
/api/workspace/files/delete
Delete a workspace file
POST
/api/workspace/git/commit
Create a git commit
POST
/api/workspace/git/push
Push git commits
POST
/api/workspace/git/pull
Pull git changes
POST
/api/workspace/execute
Execute an allow-listed command in the workspace
GET
/api/workspace/logs
Get workspace operation log
ai-automation providers
GET
/api/providers
List available AI providers
GET
/api/providers/status
Get provider configuration status
GET
/api/providers/config/{providerId}
Get provider configuration status for current user
POST
/api/providers/config
Save provider configuration
POST
/api/providers/test
Test provider configuration presence
GET
/api/providers/{provider}
Get details for a specific provider
POST
/api/providers/{provider}/validate
Validate provider credential shape without leaking secrets
POST
/api/providers/{provider}/connect
Connect provider for a user
DELETE
/api/providers/{provider}/disconnect
Disconnect provider for a user
Schemas
InterpretRequestDto
TaskSubmissionDto
FileReadRequestDto
FileWriteRequestDto
FileDeleteRequestDto
GitCommitRequestDto
GitPushRequestDto
GitPullRequestDto
CommandExecuteRequestDto
ProviderConfigRequestDto
ProviderTestRequestDto
ProviderValidationRequestDto
